---
title: "Creating a database of polynomials"
author: "E"
date: "20/5/2026"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
engine: julia
---
We will use the AbstractAlgebra package.


```{julia}
using AbstractAlgebra
```

## Lets have the discriminant of a polynomial
```{julia}
function discriminant(f)
    return resultant(f,derivative(f)) 
end
```

## Separation bounds

The following code is implementing the Mahler Mignotte separation bound for the roots of a polynomial. 
The code is based on the following paper TODO cite the paper.


Here is an example of how to use the function.

<!-- 
```{julia}
R, x = polynomial_ring(ZZ, :x)
f = x^3 - 6x^2 + 11x - 6
println(discriminant(f))

```     -->
